Hello everyone! This is my second Purelily Bot, and I'm planning to make a PV (Pure Vanilla) POV too. It came a little late, since I was really busy these days, and i need some preparation for uploading.

My Suggestion Page is going to be available soon, so you guys will be able to suggest bots easily.

Questions and Answers

  1. Do you plan on making more Purelily bots?

    • Yes, I plan to make more bots. Yes, I plan to make more bots, since this is my favorite ship, and people seem to like it.

  2. What motivates you to create more bots of this type?

    • Well, the main thing that motivates me is what I've already said before, which is being a ship that people like, And one that I personally enjoy. Furthermore, there are few of them on the platform, which motivates me to bring more to you.

  3. Will you create bots with Any POV? 👤

    • Absolutely. These bots give the user more freedom and flexibility to use different types of characters without difficulty.

  4. What is your main focus for bots right now?

    • I plan to make CRK bots for quite some time. I plan to keep making CRK bots for quite some time, as I enjoy making them and find all the characters in the franchise very interesting. The fact that I play a lot myself helps a great deal.
